content:
Hi Perry

When you test your sending & receiving server settings in TBA, do they succeed? If not, what errors are reported.

Settings > account > ... fetching mail > incoming server. sending mail > outgoing server.

Are you using oAuth authentication or plain username and password.

Some email providers such as Yahoo have recently changed and no longer accept plain user name and password. Oauth or app passwords are now required.

Who is your provider and do you connect via imap or pop3.

The more information you can provide, the greater chance we have to assist you.
creator: platform34

content:
The Thundebird Android UI doesn't support sorting with multiple criteria. You can sort either by sender (alphabetically) or date, but not both.

Feel free to clarify if I'm misunderstanding your question.

You can add any suggestions and ideas you have on Mozilla connect where the community can vote on them.

https://connect.mozilla.org/t5/ideas/idb-p/ideas/label-name/thunderbird%20android
creator: platform34

Hi Bruno

Please report this by creating a bug report at the github link below. https://github.com/thunderbird/thunderbird-android/issues

You should capture a debug log and attach it with the report. See guide linked below.
